SOM K=2 4-dataset inspect (random colors + verbose response)

~12 samples per dataset. Goal: spot annotation noise (wrong GT bbox / abstract phrase / unmatched objects).

vg (12 examples)

Which colored outlined region (red=1, green=2) shows books are kept at the shelf? Answer with the mark number.
['The red region (Mark 1)', 'The green region (Mark 2)']
GT: The red region (Mark 1)
vg/vg_0000010 · gt=(0.65,0.44) wrong=(0.60,0.41)

['The blue region (Mark 1)', 'The yellow region (Mark 2)']
GT: The blue region (Mark 1)
